_note: Synthetic vectors authored via the oracle method. Inputs are taken from the upstream TTN example frames (Apache-2.0) where available and otherwise constructed from the documented wire format (bytes[2] report type, bytes[3] battery in 0.1 V with high bit = low-battery flag, bytes[4] motion/activity state). expected.data is authored here against the normalized vocabulary, not copied from upstream normalizeUplink. The R311FA reports only a boolean motion-detected state plus battery; it has no event count and no velocity/acceleration magnitude.

uplink.description: Status report, motion detected, 3.0 V battery
Status report, no motion, 3.2 V battery
Status report, motion detected, low-battery flag set (high bit of byte 3), 2.4 V
Device info / startup version frame carries no measurement
Config response on fPort 7 carries no measurement
